description_long: This object is a group of waste management items centered around a large, rectangular, green metal dumpster with a flat lid. Surrounding the main dumpster are two cylindrical blue and green trash bins, one of which is filled with black garbage bags. There are also two stacked green barrels, a white rectangular container, a bundle of cardboard boxes, and a black garbage bag on the ground. A wooden broom leans against the dumpster, suggesting regular maintenance. The surfaces of the containers are mostly hard and metallic, with some plastic and cardboard elements visible among the waste and bins.
description: A green metal dumpster with a flat lid, surrounded by blue and green bins, barrels, cardboard boxes, and a broom, all arranged as a waste management cluster.
description_view_0: The green dumpster is seen from an angle, with a blue bin and cardboard boxes visible in the foreground.
description_view_1: A clear side view of the green dumpster, with all surrounding bins, barrels, and waste items lined up and visible.
description_view_2: A rear-angled view showing the blue bin elevated, the green barrels stacked, and the black garbage bag more prominent.
description_view_3: The back of the green dumpster is visible, with the blue bin and barrels on either side and the broom leaning against the dumpster.
attribute_lid_type: flat, single-section, metal lid with no visible locking or opening mechanism
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area, residential alley, or near public sidewalks
